channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [VIRTUALS] Kati Patang Lifestyle Ltd: Promoters Declare No Pledge of Shares as of 31st March 2025
item.description:
Kati Patang Lifestyle Ltd has received a disclosure from its promoter under Regulation 31(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulation 2011. The promoter and promoter group have declared that they have not made any encumbrance of shares directly or indirectly during the financial year ended on 31st March 2026.

  • Kati Patang Lifestyle Ltd promoter declares no pledge of shares as of 31st March 2025
  • Disclosure received under Regulation 31(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulation 2011
  • No encumbrance of shares directly or indirectly during the financial year ended on 31st March 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VIRTUALSOFT SYSTEMS LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [KAJARIR] KIC Metaliks Ltd Receives Declaration Under SEBI Regulations for FY 2025-2026
item.description:
KIC Metaliks Ltd has received a declaration from Karni Syntex Private Limited and Radhey Shyam Jalan under Regulation 31(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The declaration states that neither Karni Syntex Private Limited nor Radhey Shyam Jalan, both promoters of KIC Metaliks Limited, have made any encumbrance on the Shares of KIC Metaliks Limited during the financial year ending on March 31, 2026. The disclosures under Regulation 31(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 for the year ended 31st March, 2026 have been enclosed for your information and record.

  • KIC Metaliks Ltd receives declaration from promoters under SEBI regulations
  • Karni Syntex Private Limited and Radhey Shyam Jalan have not made any encumbrance on KIC Metaliks Limited shares
  • Disclosures under SEBI regulations for the year ended 31st March, 2026 have been provided

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KIC METALIKS LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [LEENEE] Lee & Nee Softwares Exports Ltd Annual Disclosure under Regulation 30(2) for FY2025-2026
item.description:
Lee & Nee Softwares Exports Ltd, in compliance with Regulation 30(2) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, has disclosed the annual shareholding and voting rights held by the Promoter and Promoter Group together with Persons acting in concert as on March 31, 2026. The disclosure includes the holdings of Arpita Gupta, Leena Harshal Agrawal, Raj Kumari Agarwal, Mahesh Gupta, S.M.Gupta, Neena Gupta, Sunita Gupta, Haresh Collections Pvt. Ltd, Rituraj Shares & Securities Ltd, and S M Gupta HUF.

  • Lee & Nee Softwares Exports Ltd has disclosed the annual shareholding and voting rights as of March 31, 2026.
  • The disclosure includes the holdings of Promoter and Promoter Group together with Persons acting in concert.
  • The list of shareholders includes Arpita Gupta, Leena Harshal Agrawal, Raj Kumari Agarwal, Mahesh Gupta, S.M.Gupta, Neena Gupta, Sunita Gupta, Haresh Collections Pvt. Ltd, Rituraj Shares & Securities Ltd, and S M Gupta HUF.
  • The disclosure is in compliance with Regulation 30(2) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LEE & NEE SOFTWARES (EXPORTS) LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [CENTURYTEX] Birla Estates Clocks Over INR 1,600 Crores in Bookings Within a Month of Launch at Birla Arika Phase 2, Gurugram
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Birla Estates, a wholly owned subsidiary of Aditya Birla Real Estate Limited, has achieved bookings exceeding INR 1,600 crores for its luxury project, Birla Arika Phase 2 in Sector 31, Gurugram. Nearly 97% of the residences-152 of 156 units-were sold within a month of launch, underlining strong buyer confidence in the brand's luxury developments in Gurugram. The project features four exclusive clubs, each offering distinct and immersive lifestyle experiences tailored to diverse resident needs.

  • Birla Estates achieved bookings exceeding INR 1,600 crores for Birla Arika Phase 2 within a month of launch
  • Nearly 97% of the residences were sold, indicating strong buyer confidence
  • The project is strategically located in Central Gurugram, one of the city's most established and well-connected residential micro-markets
  • The project features four exclusive clubs, each offering distinct and immersive lifestyle experiences
  • Birla Estates has a strong presence in NCR with a growing portfolio of premium and luxury residential developments

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CENTURY TEXTILES & INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [ALKEM] Alkem Laboratories Launches A to Z Daily Multivitamin Supplement
item.description:
Alkem Laboratories Ltd. has announced the launch of A to Z Daily, an everyday multivitamin supplement for adults. The supplement is formulated with 26 essential vitamins, minerals, and botanicals to provide holistic nutritional support to the body and mind. The key vitamins and minerals include Vitamin B complex, Vitamin D3, Vitamin C, Zinc, and Iron, which help in boosting energy levels, reducing fatigue, and improving immunity. The product also contains clinically-researched botanicals such as Ashwagandha, Bacopa monnieri (Brahmi), Panax ginseng, and an amino acid L-theanine, which help in managing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting cognitive function. A to Z Daily is designed for consistent, long-term use as part of a preventive wellness approach.

  • Alkem Laboratories launches A to Z Daily, an everyday multivitamin supplement for adults
  • Formulated with 26 essential vitamins, minerals, and botanicals for holistic nutritional support
  • Key vitamins and minerals include Vitamin B complex, Vitamin D3, Vitamin C, Zinc, and Iron
  • Includes clinically-researched botanicals such as Ashwagandha, Bacopa monnieri (Brahmi), Panax ginseng, and L-theanine
  • Designed for consistent, long-term use as part of a preventive wellness approach

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Alkem Laboratories Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [SVPHOUSING] Ganesha Ecoverse Ltd. Clarifies No Price-Sensitive Information Behind Security's Significant Movement
item.description:
In response to a letter from BSE, Ganesha Ecoverse Ltd. has clarified that there is no price sensitive information or impending announcements that could affect the company's operation or performance. The company is committed to complying with the applicable provisions of the SEBI Listing Regulations, promptly informing the Exchange of all material information, events, or announcements.

  • Ganesha Ecoverse Ltd. has clarified that there is no price sensitive information behind the significant movement of its security on the Exchange.
  • The company confirmed that there are no events or information that could affect its operation or performance.
  • Ganesha Ecoverse Ltd. is committed to complying with the applicable provisions of the SEBI Listing Regulations.
  • The company will continue to promptly inform the Exchange of all material information, events, or announcements.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SVP Housing Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [CYIENTDLM] Cyient DLM Ltd to Approve Q4FY26 Audited Financial Results on 21st April 2026
item.description:
Cyient DLM Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on 21st April 2026 to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended 31st March 2026. This information has been disclosed as per Regulation 29 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 and will also be hosted on the company's website.

  • Cyient DLM Ltd to consider and approve Q4FY26 audited financial results
  • Meeting scheduled for 21st April 2026
  • Results to be hosted on the company's website
  • Disclosure as per Regulation 29 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cyient DLM Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [BANKINDIA] Bank of India Announces Change in Senior Management Assignment
item.description:
Bank of India has informed the Exchange about a change in the assignment of its Senior Management. The Vice-President of the Listing Department at BSE Ltd. and National Stock Exchange of India Ltd. have been notified about the changes. The changes involve the redesignation of Shri Satyendra Singh from CGM — CTO to CGM — CIO and Shri Ashutosh Mishra from GM — CFTO & Data Analytics to GM — IT & CTO.

  • Bank of India announces change in Senior Management assignment
  • Shri Satyendra Singh redesignated from CGM — CTO to CGM — CIO
  • Shri Ashutosh Mishra redesignated from GM — CFTO & Data Analytics to GM — IT & CTO

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BANK OF INDIA | Category: Business Update

item.title: [OLAELEC] Ola Electric Announces Readiness of Indigenous 46100 LFP Cell, Advancing Its End ICE Age Vision
item.description:
Ola Electric Mobility Limited has announced the readiness of its in-house developed Lithium Iron Phosphate (LFP) cell, marking a significant milestone in its mission to accelerate electric mobility and build a full-stack energy ecosystem. The new 46100 format LFP cell is bigger than the current NMC 4680 Bharat Cell and represents a step-change in scale, cost efficiency, and applicability across both mobility and energy storage solutions. The announcement comes as Ola Electric’s Gigafactory ramp continues to progress strongly, with thousands of vehicles powered by its 4680 Bharat Cells already on Indian roads. The Ola Gigafactory currently has a capacity of 2.5 GWh and is presently being scaled up to 6 GWh. The introduction of LFP chemistry is expected to unlock further reductions in vehicle cost and accelerate EV adoption. Ola Electric continues to focus on removing barriers to EV adoption through a combination of innovation and customer-centric initiatives.

  • Ola Electric announces the readiness of its indigenously developed LFP cell
  • New 46100 format LFP cell represents a step-change in scale and cost efficiency
  • Ola Electric’s Gigafactory ramp continues to progress strongly with thousands of vehicles on Indian roads
  • Ola Gigafactory currently has a capacity of 2.5 GWh and is being scaled up to 6 GWh
  • Introduction of LFP chemistry expected to unlock further reductions in vehicle cost and accelerate EV adoption

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ola Electric Mobility Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [ESCORTS] Escorts Kubota Ltd. to Increase Prices of Kubota Brand Tractors from April 15, 2026
item.description:
Escorts Kubota Ltd., a leading engineering conglomerate in India, has announced a price increase for Kubota brand tractors. The price increase will be effective from April 15, 2026, and will vary across models, variants, and geographies. This decision comes after the company's earlier intimation regarding price increase of tractors other than the Kubota brand.

  • Escorts Kubota Ltd. to increase prices of Kubota brand tractors from April 15, 2026
  • Price increase will vary across models, variants, and geographies
  • Announcement follows the company's earlier intimation regarding price increase of tractors other than Kubota brand
  • Escorts Kubota Ltd. is a leading engineering conglomerate in India with eight decades of experience in manufacturing excellence
  • The company operates in the high growth sectors of agricultural mechanization and transformation of Indian construction

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Escorts Kubota Ltd | Category: Deals
